g.text: PJM is quantified. MISO is the seasonal boundary test: uniform summer clearing supports the mechanism, while constrained fall clearing localizes it. Other markets are precondition checks.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Times New Roman', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Preconditions and boundary conditions across capacity markets; ERCOT is the design comparator
